data.description: SCHUMER HAS EXIT STRATEGY IN EVENT OF GOVERNMENT SHUTDOWN: WSJ

data.title: Elcora files overdue financial statements, confirms completion of annual and interim reports for 2025.
data.description: In Halifax, Nova Scotia, on September 26, 2025, ELCORA ADVANCED MATERIALS CORP. (TSX.V:ERA | Frankfurt:ELM0 | OTCQB: ECORF) provided an update regarding the Management Cease Trade Order (MCTO) issued by the Nova Scotia Securities Commission on July 30, 2025. The Company has successfully filed its audited annual financial statements for the year ending March 31, 2025, along with the necessary management discussion and analysis, and CEO and CFO certificates by the required deadline of July 29, 2025. Furthermore, ELCORA also submitted its interim financial statements for the period concluding on June 30, 2025, along with the corresponding management discussion and analysis, and CEO and CFO certificates within the stipulated timeframe by August 29, 2025.

data.title: Sempra to join Wolfe Research Conference 2025; CEO Jeffrey W. Martin & EVP Karen Sedgwick to participate.
data.description: Sempra Corporation (NYSE: SRE), headquartered in San Diego, revealed today that its executives will be attending the Wolfe Research Utilities, Midstream & Clean Energy Conference 2025. Among the attendees are Jeffrey W. Martin, the company's chairman and CEO, as well as Karen Sedgwick, executive vice president and CFO. This event provides a platform for discussing and exploring various energy-related topics. Sempra's involvement in such conferences indicates its commitment to staying abreast of industry trends and advancements.
Iran's President Pezeshkian: We are prepared to be transparent about our highly-enriched uranium.

data.title: EA stock rises on news of potential go-private deal by investor group.
data.description: The stock of Electronic Arts surged following reports that a consortium of investors is close to finalizing a deal to privatize the video game company. This news led to a significant increase in the company's stock value.

data.title: Biopharma stocks surge after Trump threatens 100% pharmaceuticals tariff, causing industry concerns.
data.description: This week, President Donald Trump intensified pressure on the pharmaceutical sector by proposing 100% tariffs on certain companies. In response, biopharma stocks saw a surge in value, signaling optimism among investors.

data.title: Crinetics Pharma's shares surged after FDA approved acromegaly drug Palsonify. Major approval news for company.
data.description: Crinetics Pharmaceuticals experienced a significant increase in stock price on Friday following the approval of their acromegaly drug, Palsonify, by the FDA. The news resulted in a surge in shares of the company. The FDA's approval marks a significant milestone for Crinetics Pharmaceuticals in the treatment of acromegaly. It is a positive development for the company as they strive to address the medical needs of patients with this growth disorder. This move led to a notable increase in the company's market value, showing investors' confidence in the newly approved treatment.

data.title: Top investors eyeing Tether's mega $500B fundraise as it diversifies beyond USDT for yield income.
data.description: SoftBank and ARK are considering investing in Tether, potentially valuing the stablecoin issuer at around $500 billion. This investment would mark a significant diversification for Tether away from its primary USDT focus.

data.title: Grayscale suggests Q3 altseason due to Bitcoin's underperformance; Ether and other assets outperformed. US policy changes boosted some sectors.
data.description: During the third quarter, Grayscale reported that certain market sectors experienced notable gains due to changes in US policy. However, Bitcoin showed lower performance in comparison to Ether and alternative cryptocurrencies.

data.title: Mesabi Trust starts arbitration against Northshore Mining Company & Cleveland Cliffs for idling Northshore.
data.description: A recent development in New York reveals that Mesabi Trust has begun an arbitration process against Northshore Mining Company and its parent company, Cleveland Cliffs Inc. The arbitration, initiated on September 26, 2025, involves Mesabi Trust seeking damages and declaratory relief from Northshore and Cliffs. The arbitration was commenced through the American Arbitration Association due to concerns related to the idling of Northshore by the Operator. Mesabi Trust is pursuing this legal action to address the issues arising from the leased lands operated by Northshore and Cliffs.

data.title: Lennar Corp (NYSE: LEN, LEN.B) declares $0.50 per share dividend on Class A & B stock, payable Oct 27, 2025.
data.description: In Miami on September 26, 2025, Lennar Corporation, a prominent homebuilding company listed on NYSE under symbols LEN and LEN.B, revealed that its Board of Directors approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.50 per share for its Class A and Class B ordinary stocks. Shareholders can anticipate this dividend payment on October 27, 2025.

data.title: DeFi Technologies closed a $100M offering, listed on Nasdaq (DEFT), CBOE (DEFI), and GR (R9B). Bridging gap between markets.
data.description: On September 26, 2025, DeFi Technologies Inc., listed on Nasdaq as DEFT, CBOE CA as DEFI, and GR as R9B, announced its latest financial technology solutions. The company aims to connect traditional capital markets with decentralized systems.

data.title: CEC Entertainment secures $625M loan & amends revolving credit facility to enhance operations and offerings.
data.description: CEC Entertainment, LLC, headquartered in Irving, Texas, announced on September 26, 2025, that it has finalized a $625 million private credit term loan facility. The company, well-known for its family entertainment and dining offerings, also made adjustments to its current revolving credit agreement.

data.title: Austin-based Allen Control Systems (ACS) has won a contract to integrate its Bullfrog™ autonomous weapon system onto U.S. SOF maritime platforms in collaboration with defense contractor ManTech.
data.description: In Austin, Texas, Allen Control Systems (ACS), a prominent autonomous precision robotics company, revealed today that it has secured a contract in partnership with defense contractor ManTech to incorporate its Bullfrog™ autonomous weapon system onto U.S. Special Operations Forces (SOF) maritime platforms. This collaboration aims to provide direct support to the warfighters. ACS is focused on developing advanced autonomous weapon systems to address the needs of contemporary warfare. Their key product, Bullfrog™, employs artificial intelligence for optimal function.
France's outlook was dropped to 'negative' from 'stable' at Scope Ratings.

data.title: JFB Construction Holdings to raise $44 million in private placement on Nasdaq, with gross proceeds of nearly $43.9 million from the sole investor, American Ventures LLC.
data.description: Lantana, Florida - September 26, 2025 - JFB Construction Holdings (Nasdaq: JFB), a real estate development and construction firm specializing in hospitality, commercial, industrial, and residential projects, revealed today that it has finalized a securities purchase deal with American Ventures LLC, Series XIV JFB as the exclusive investor for a private investment in public equity ("PIPE") funding. This transaction is anticipated to generate around $43,895,000 in gross funds for the Company, prior to accounting for placement agent fees and offering expenses.

data.title: Broadstone Net Lease closes $350 million Senior Notes Offering in Victor, NY.
data.description: Broadstone Net Lease has completed a senior notes offering worth $350 million in Victor, New York.
